---
title: "Learning"
author: "Milaotou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide
    css: styles.css
---
# <span style="display: none;">设置代码块全局选项</span>{.unnumbered}
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	fig.align = "center",
	fig.height = 8,
	fig.width = 10,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	tidy = TRUE
)
library(rstudioapi)
setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
getwd()
```

# 加载包
```{r libraries}

```




```{r}

```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```


```{r}
rm(list=ls())  # 清除环境变量  
# 设置工作路径
library(this.path);setwd(dirname(this.path()));getwd()
############数据读取与数据预处理###############
library(dplyr) # 加载dplyr包，用于数据操作（如rename）
library(readr) # 加载readr包，用于高效的读取数据（如read_csv）
library(ggplot2) # 加载ggplot2包，用于绘图

all.lines <- read_csv( # 使用read_csv读取CSV文件，结果赋值给变量all.lines
  file = "Fig2d_swimmer_ANON.csv", # 指定文件路径（相对于工作目录）
  col_names = TRUE, # 第一行作为列名
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character()) # 将所有列先按字符类型读取，避免类型猜测错误
) %>%
  type_convert() %>% # 然后自动转换列类型（基于数据内容）
  rename( # 重命名以下几列，使其更规范
    Reason.Stop = Reason_Stop, # 将"Reason_Stop"重命名为"Reason.Stop"
    Best.Response = Best_Resposne, # 将"Best_Resposne"（原始数据拼写如此）重命名为"Best.Response"
    Start.Date.norm = Deidentified_Start_Date, # 将"Deidentified_Start_Date"重命名为"Start.Date.norm"
    End.Date.norm = Deidentified_End_Date # 将"Deidentified_End_Date"重命名为"End.Date.norm"
  )

#####泳道图swimmer plot绘制#####
main_plot <- all.lines %>% # 以数据框 all.lines 为起点
  ggplot(mapping = aes(y = index, fill = Tx.Type)) + # y轴为患者编号，填充色由治疗类型决定
  scale_fill_manual(values = c( # 手动设置三种治疗类型的填充颜色
    "cdk" = "#F16A6C", # CDK治疗为红色
    "parp" = "#6C90CA", # PARP治疗为蓝色
    "bet" = "#C6C6C4" # BET治疗为灰色
  )) +
  xlab("Time (months)") + # x轴标签：时间（月）
  ylab("") + # y轴无标签
  geom_rect( # 绘制矩形条，代表每位患者的治疗持续时间
    aes(
      xmin = Start.Date.norm, # 治疗开始时间
      xmax = End.Date.norm, # 治疗结束时间
      ymin = index - 0.3, # 矩形纵向范围（覆盖半个患者条带）
      ymax = index + 0.3,
      fill = Tx.Type # 按治疗类型填充颜色
    ),
    size = 0, color = NA # 无边框
  ) +
  geom_segment( # 绘制箭头：表示治疗仍在进行（Ongoing）
    data = subset(all.lines, Reason.Stop == "Ongoing" & Tx.Type %in% c("cdk", "parp")),
    aes(
      x = 0, # 箭头起点x=0（从治疗开始？实际从0开始，但治疗起始可能>0？可能统一从0开始画线到结束+2）
      y = index,
      xend = End.Date.norm + 2, # 终点在结束时间后延伸2个单位，加箭头表示仍在继续
      yend = index
    ),
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))
  ) +
  geom_segment( # 绘制线段：表示治疗已结束（非Ongoing）
    data = subset(all.lines, Reason.Stop != "Ongoing" & Tx.Type %in% c("cdk", "parp")),
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = index,
      xend = End.Date.norm, # 终点为实际结束时间
      yend = index
    )
  ) +
  # 以下三个geom_point层在治疗结束时间点上标记不同停止原因
  geom_point( # 黑色菱形：因疾病进展停止
    data = subset(all.lines, Reason.Stop == "Disease Progression" & Tx.Type %in% c("cdk", "parp")),
    aes(x = End.Date.norm, y = index),
    color = "#333333", shape = 18, size = 3.0
  ) +
  geom_point( # 灰色菱形：因医生决定、毒性或换药停止
    data = subset(all.lines, Reason.Stop %in% c("MD Preference", "Toxicity", "Switch Treatment") & Tx.Type %in% c("cdk", "parp")),
    aes(x = End.Date.norm, y = index),
    color = "#BBBBBC", shape = 18, size = 3.0
  ) +
  # 以下三个geom_point层在扫描时间点标记最佳疗效（仅限非快速进展者）
  geom_point( # 白色圆点：完全缓解（CR）
    data = subset(all.lines, Rapid.Prog == 0 & Best.Response == "CR"),
    aes(x = Scan.Date.Norm, y = index),
    color = "#FFFDEC", shape = 19, size = 3
  ) +
  geom_point( # 浅蓝色圆点：部分缓解（PR）
    data = subset(all.lines, Rapid.Prog == 0 & Best.Response == "PR"),
    aes(x = Scan.Date.Norm, y = index),
    color = "#9cc0cd", shape = 19, size = 3
  ) +
  geom_point( # 深灰色圆点：疾病稳定（SD）
    data = subset(all.lines, Rapid.Prog == 0 & Best.Response == "SD"),
    aes(x = Scan.Date.Norm, y = index),
    color = "#6b8590", shape = 19, size = 3
  ) +
  # 以下部分在图的左侧（负x轴）绘制方块，展示CDK治疗患者的不同特征
  # 治疗线数：方块颜色深浅表示第1、2、>2线
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & Tx.Line == 1),
    aes(x = -2, y = index), fill = "#E2EEF5", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & Tx.Line == 2),
    aes(x = -2, y = index), fill = "#8FB9D1", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & Tx.Line > 2),
    aes(x = -2, y = index), fill = "#2389AF", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  # LOH状态：粉色、浅粉、白色方块
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & LOH_status == "AI_LOH_ALT"),
    aes(x = -4, y = index), fill = "#DF3E9C", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & LOH_status == "No_LOH"),
    aes(x = -4, y = index), fill = "#FAC1E3", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & LOH_status == "Non_evaluable"),
    aes(x = -4, y = index), fill = "#FFFFFF", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  # 具体CDK药物：三种颜色区分Palbo、Abema、Ribo
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & CDK == "Palbociclib"),
    aes(x = -6, y = index), fill = "#EEDCD6", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & CDK == "Abemaciclib"),
    aes(x = -6, y = index), fill = "#D38D7B", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & CDK == "Ribociclib"),
    aes(x = -6, y = index), fill = "#955442", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  # 联合用药：AI（芳香化酶抑制剂）或SERD（选择性雌激素受体下调剂）
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & AI.SERD == "AI"),
    aes(x = -8, y = index), fill = "#E9CBF2", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & AI.SERD == "SERD"),
    aes(x = -8, y = index), fill = "#BC59D3", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  # 是否曾接受过铂类治疗：绿色深浅表示是/否
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & Interim.Platinum == 1),
    aes(x = -10, y = index), fill = "#00B26E", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(all.lines, Tx.Type == "cdk" & Interim.Platinum == 0),
    aes(x = -10, y = index), fill = "#B2E1C4", color = "black", shape = 22, size = 4.5
  ) +
  # 绘制坐标轴（x=0 垂直线，y=0 水平线）
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = 0, y = 0, yend = max(all.lines$index) + 0.3),
               color = "black", linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = 85, y = 0, yend = 0),
               color = "black", linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0), add = c(0, 0.5))) + # 控制y轴范围
  theme_classic() + # 使用经典主题
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(), # 隐藏y轴刻度文字
    axis.line = element_blank(), # 隐藏默认轴线（已手动绘制）
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none", # 隐藏图例（颜色已由左侧方块隐含说明）
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15, color = "black", vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black", vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
  )

print(main_plot) # 显示图形

# 创建右侧图例（治疗类型、停止原因、最佳疗效）
legend_right <- ggplot() +
  xlim(0, 1) + # 设置x轴范围，用于定位图例元素
  ylim(0.16, 1) + # 设置y轴范围
  
  # ---- 治疗类型标题 ----
annotate("text",
         x = 0.1, y = 0.95,
         label = "Treatment",
         hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold"
) +
  
  # CDK4/6i 治疗（红色方块）
  annotate("point", x = 0.12, y = 0.88, shape = 15, size = 6, color = "#F16A6C") +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.16, y = 0.88, label = "CDK4/6i + ET",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # PARPi 治疗（蓝色方块）
  annotate("point", x = 0.12, y = 0.83, shape = 15, size = 6, color = "#6C90CA") +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.16, y = 0.83, label = "PARPi",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # 中间治疗（灰色方块，跨两行文字）
  annotate("point", x = 0.12, y = 0.78, shape = 15, size = 6, color = "#C6C6C4") +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.16, y = 0.78, label = "Treatment lines between",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.16, y = 0.73, label = "CDK4/6i and PARPi",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # ---- 停止原因标题 ----
annotate("text",
         x = 0.1, y = 0.63, label = "Reason for stop",
         hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold"
) +
  
  # 毒性/医生偏好（灰色菱形）
  annotate("point", x = 0.12, y = 0.56, shape = 18, size = 6, color = "#BBBBBC") +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.16, y = 0.56, label = "Toxicity / MD preference",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # 疾病进展（黑色菱形）
  annotate("point", x = 0.12, y = 0.51, shape = 18, size = 6, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.16, y = 0.51, label = "Progression",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # 治疗仍在进行（箭头）
  annotate("segment",
           x = 0.10, xend = 0.14, y = 0.46, yend = 0.46,
           arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")), color = "black", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.16, y = 0.46, label = "Ongoing",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # ---- 最佳疗效标题 ----
annotate("text",
         x = 0.1, y = 0.39, label = "Best achieved response",
         hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold"
) +
  
  # 疾病稳定（深灰填充圆点）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.12, y = 0.34, shape = 21, size = 6,
           fill = "#6b8590", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.16, y = 0.34, label = "Stable disease",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # 部分缓解（浅蓝填充圆点）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.12, y = 0.29, shape = 21, size = 6,
           fill = "#9cc0cd", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.16, y = 0.29, label = "Partial response",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # 完全缓解（米白填充圆点）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.12, y = 0.24, shape = 21, size = 6,
           fill = "#FFFDEC", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.16, y = 0.24, label = "Complete response",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_void() + # 移除所有轴线、背景等
  coord_fixed(ratio = 2) + # 固定坐标轴比例，控制图例形状
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)) # 透明背景


# 创建底部图例（CDK4/6i相关特征）
legend_bottom <- ggplot() +
  xlim(0, 1) + # x轴范围
  ylim(0.38, 1) + # y轴范围
  
  # ---- 既往铂类治疗 ----
annotate("text",
         x = 0.01, y = 0.85, label = "Previous",
         hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold"
) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.01, y = 0.75, label = "platinum",
           hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  # 是（深绿方块）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.02, y = 0.65, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#00B26E", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.06, y = 0.65, label = "Yes",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # 否（浅绿方块）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.02, y = 0.55, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#B2E1C4", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.06, y = 0.55, label = "No",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # ---- 内分泌药物 ----
annotate("text",
         x = 0.19, y = 0.85, label = "Endocrine",
         hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold"
) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.19, y = 0.75, label = "agent",
           hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  # Fulvestrant（紫色方块）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.2, y = 0.65, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#BC59D3", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.24, y = 0.65, label = "Fulvestrant",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # 芳香化酶抑制剂（浅紫方块，分两行显示）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.2, y = 0.55, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#E9CBF2", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.24, y = 0.55, label = "Aromatase",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.24, y = 0.45, label = "inhibitor",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # ---- CDK4/6i 具体药物 ----
annotate("text",
         x = 0.41, y = 0.85, label = "CDK4/6i",
         hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold"
) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.41, y = 0.75, label = "agent",
           hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  # Palbociclib（浅棕方块）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.42, y = 0.65, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#EEDCD6", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.46, y = 0.65, label = "Palbociclib",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # Abemaciclib（中棕方块）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.42, y = 0.55, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#D38D7B", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.46, y = 0.55, label = "Abemaciclib",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # Ribociclib（深棕方块）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.42, y = 0.45, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#955442", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.46, y = 0.45, label = "Ribociclib",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # ---- BRCA2 合子状态 ----
annotate("text",
         x = 0.65, y = 0.85, label = "BRCA2",
         hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold.italic"
) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.65, y = 0.75, label = "zygosity",
           hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  # LOH（深粉方块）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.66, y = 0.65, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#DF3E9C", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.70, y = 0.65, label = "LOH",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # No LOH（浅粉方块）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.66, y = 0.55, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#FAC1E3", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.70, y = 0.55, label = "No LOH",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # NE（白色方块）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.66, y = 0.45, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#FFFFFF", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.70, y = 0.45, label = "NE",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # ---- 治疗线数 ----
annotate("text",
         x = 0.82, y = 0.85, label = "Treatment line",
         hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold"
) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.82, y = 0.75, label = "CDK4/6i",
           hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "black", fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  # 第1线（最浅蓝方块）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.83, y = 0.65, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#E2EEF5", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.86, y = 0.65, label = "1",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # 第2线（中蓝方块）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.83, y = 0.55, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#8FB9D1", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.86, y = 0.55, label = "2",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # 第3线及以上（深蓝方块，用3⁺表示）
  annotate("point",
           x = 0.83, y = 0.45, shape = 22, size = 6,
           fill = "#2389AF", color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 0.86, y = 0.45, label = '3^"+"', parse = TRUE,
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_void() + # 空白主题
  coord_fixed(ratio = 0.3) + # 压缩x轴比例，使图例扁平
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)) # 白色背景


library(patchwork) # 加载patchwork包，用于组合多个ggplot图形

# 将右侧图例（legend_right）嵌入到主图（main_plot）的指定位置
# inset_element() 可以将一个图形作为内嵌元素放入另一个图形中
# 参数 left, bottom, right, top 指定内嵌图形在父图形中的相对位置（0-1之间）
top_part <- main_plot +
  inset_element(
    legend_right,
    left = 0.6, # 内嵌图左边界位于父图60%处
    bottom = 0.2, # 内嵌图底边界位于父图20%处
    right = 0.95, # 内嵌图右边界位于父图95%处
    top = 0.98 # 内嵌图顶边界位于父图98%处
  )

# 使用patchwork的"/"操作符将上下两个图形纵向堆叠
# top_part（包含主图+右侧内嵌图例）在上，legend_bottom（底部图例）在下
# plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1)) 设置上下两部分的高度比例为3:1
top_part / legend_bottom +
  plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1))

# 将组合后的图形保存为PDF文件，指定宽度和高度均为10英寸
ggsave("swimmers_plot.png", width = 10, height = 10)

```

# Session info
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
